description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Buy 15 shares of the cheapest technology stock priced under $40 with daily trading volume over 1,000,000 shares.

tasks.instruction: Create a watchlist and add one large-cap stock (market value over $10B) from each of the Technology, Healthcare, Financials, Consumer Defensive, and Industrials sectors.

tasks.instruction: Set a price alert that triggers when your largest stock position by market value drops 5% below its current price.

tasks.instruction: Invest $2,000 in the bond ETF with an expense ratio of 0.15% or less and a rating of at least 3 stars that has the highest 5-year return.

tasks.instruction: Set up a $150 recurring monthly investment on the 1st into an S&P 500 index mutual fund whose minimum initial investment is $150 or less.

tasks.instruction: Sell enough shares of your largest stock holding by market value so the estimated proceeds from the market order are between $550 and $650, using a day-only duration.

tasks.instruction: Compare the two largest international equity ETFs by assets under management and add to a new watchlist the one with the lower expense ratio, as long as it has at least $500M in assets.

tasks.instruction: Transfer $1,000 from your brokerage cash into the active savings or cash management product with an interest rate of at least 3% that offers the highest rate.
